requirement_topic.en: MIC Import Permit for Large BESS Systems
requirement_topic.zh: 大型储能系统MIC进口许可
requirement_topic.zht: 大型儲能系統MIC進口許可

summary.en: Large BESS projects or project equipment may require import permit handling through the Myanmar Investment Commission or related investment and customs channels. Importers should confirm permit need, HS classification, project approval linkage, and supporting technical documents before shipment.
summary.zh: 大型储能项目或项目设备可能需要通过缅甸投资委员会或相关投资及海关渠道办理进口许可。进口商应在发货前确认许可需求、HS归类、项目批准关联和支持性技术文件。
summary.zht: 大型儲能項目或項目設備可能需要通過緬甸投資委員會或相關投資及海關渠道辦理進口許可。進口商應在發貨前確認許可需求、HS歸類、項目批准關聯和支持性技術文件。

standards_or_laws: MIC import permit and investment approval practice

summary.en: Common China BESS evidence is typically built around GB/T 36276 for lithium-ion batteries for energy storage, GB 4943.1 for electrical safety where applicable, and GB/T 34131 for grid-connected energy storage converter requirements.
summary.zh: 中国常见储能系统证据通常以GB/T 36276储能用锂离子电池、适用时的GB 4943.1电气安全，以及GB/T 34131并网储能变流器要求为基础。
summary.zht: 中國常見儲能系統證據通常以GB/T 36276儲能用鋰離子電池、適用時的GB 4943.1電氣安全，以及GB/T 34131並網儲能變流器要求為基礎。

gap.en: A China product certificate is not an import permit. The gap is administrative: local importer identity, permit route, HS code, project approval linkage, and customs documentation must be arranged before shipment.
gap.zh: 中国产品证书不是进口许可。差距在行政手续：本地进口商身份、许可路径、HS编码、项目批准关联和海关文件须在发货前安排。
gap.zht: 中國產品證書不是進口許可。差距在行政手續：本地進口商身份、許可路徑、HS編碼、項目批准關聯和海關文件須在發貨前安排。

mandatory_status.target: Potentially mandatory for large systems or project imports; confirm with MIC, importer, and customs broker.
mandatory_status.cn: China baseline normally uses GB/T 36276, GB 4943.1 where applicable, and GB/T 34131; export-side evidence does not replace Myanmar import approval.

source.publisher: Directorate of Investment and Company Administration / Myanmar Investment Commission

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Lock the Myanmar importer, MIC route, HS code, and permit evidence before booking shipment for a large BESS.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 大型储能系统订舱前，应锁定缅甸进口商、MIC路径、HS编码和许可证明。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 大型儲能系統訂艙前，應鎖定緬甸進口商、MIC路徑、HS編碼和許可證明。

requirement_topic.en: MSTRD Conformity Documents for Regulated Categories
requirement_topic.zh: 受监管类别的MSTRD合格文件
requirement_topic.zht: 受監管類別的MSTRD合格文件

summary.en: Myanmar standards are largely voluntary, but some regulated categories need conformity documents. For BESS, the importer should check whether MSTRD conformity assessment, test-report acceptance, or MS/IEC evidence is requested for the specific cabinet, PCS, battery module, or integrated system.
summary.zh: 缅甸标准整体以自愿为主，但部分受监管类别需要合格文件。对储能系统，进口商应确认具体电柜、PCS、电池模块或集成系统是否被要求进行MSTRD合格评定、测试报告接受或提供MS/IEC证据。
summary.zht: 緬甸標準整體以自願為主，但部分受監管類別需要合格文件。對儲能系統，進口商應確認具體電櫃、PCS、電池模組或集成系統是否被要求進行MSTRD合格評定、測試報告接受或提供MS/IEC證據。

standards_or_laws: Applicable Myanmar Standards or IEC standards

summary.en: Common China BESS evidence is typically built around GB/T 36276 for lithium-ion batteries for energy storage, GB 4943.1 for electrical safety where applicable, and GB/T 34131 for grid-connected energy storage converter requirements.
summary.zh: 中国常见储能系统证据通常以GB/T 36276储能用锂离子电池、适用时的GB 4943.1电气安全，以及GB/T 34131并网储能变流器要求为基础。
summary.zht: 中國常見儲能系統證據通常以GB/T 36276儲能用鋰離子電池、適用時的GB 4943.1電氣安全，以及GB/T 34131並網儲能變流器要求為基礎。

gap.en: The uncertainty is scope. China reports should be mapped to each imported component because Myanmar conformity review may look at the integrated system and not only the battery cell or module.
gap.zh: 不确定点在适用范围。中国报告应映射到每个进口组件，因为缅甸合格审查可能关注集成系统，而不只是电芯或模组。
gap.zht: 不確定點在適用範圍。中國報告應映射到每個進口組件，因為緬甸合格審查可能關注集成系統，而不只是電芯或模組。

mandatory_status.target: Voluntary unless the category, authority, importer, tender, or project approval makes conformity documents required.
mandatory_status.cn: China baseline normally uses GB/T 36276, GB 4943.1 where applicable, and GB/T 34131; scope mapping is needed for Myanmar.

source.publisher: Ministry of Science and Technology / MSTRD

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Ask the importer to obtain an MSTRD scope view for the exact BESS bill of materials before assuming voluntary standards mean no documentation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应让进口商针对准确的储能系统物料清单取得MSTRD适用范围意见，不应因标准自愿就假设无需文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應讓進口商針對準確的儲能系統物料清單取得MSTRD適用範圍意見，不應因標準自願就假設無需文件。

summary.en: If a BESS includes cellular, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, LoRa, or other radio telemetry modules, Myanmar radio approval may be required through MPT or the responsible telecommunications authority. Non-radio BESS electrical conformity does not cover radio spectrum authorization.
summary.zh: 如储能系统包含蜂窝、Wi-Fi、蓝牙、LoRa或其他无线遥测模块，可能需要通过MPT或负责电信主管机构办理缅甸无线电批准。非无线储能电气合格不覆盖无线电频谱授权。
summary.zht: 如儲能系統包含蜂窩、Wi-Fi、藍牙、LoRa或其他無線遙測模組，可能需要通過MPT或負責電信主管機構辦理緬甸無線電批准。非無線儲能電氣合格不覆蓋無線電頻譜授權。

standards_or_laws: Myanmar radio or telecommunications equipment approval practice
MPT or telecommunications authority requirements for radio modules

summary.en: Common China BESS evidence is typically built around GB/T 36276 for lithium-ion batteries for energy storage, GB 4943.1 for electrical safety where applicable, and GB/T 34131 for grid-connected energy storage converter requirements.
summary.zh: 中国常见储能系统证据通常以GB/T 36276储能用锂离子电池、适用时的GB 4943.1电气安全，以及GB/T 34131并网储能变流器要求为基础。
summary.zht: 中國常見儲能系統證據通常以GB/T 36276儲能用鋰離子電池、適用時的GB 4943.1電氣安全，以及GB/T 34131並網儲能變流器要求為基礎。

gap.en: China SRRC or module certificates do not automatically authorize radio use in Myanmar. The radio module list, bands, output power, and local approval route should be checked separately from BESS safety.
gap.zh: 中国SRRC或模块证书不会自动授权在缅甸使用无线电。应将无线模块清单、频段、输出功率和当地批准路径与储能安全分开核查。
gap.zht: 中國SRRC或模組證書不會自動授權在緬甸使用無線電。應將無線模組清單、頻段、輸出功率和當地批准路徑與儲能安全分開核查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory if radio transmitting modules are imported or operated; not applicable to non-radio configurations.
mandatory_status.cn: China baseline normally uses GB/T 36276, GB 4943.1 where applicable, and GB/T 34131; radio approval is separate.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Separate the BESS electrical dossier from radio-module approval; list every transmitting module and confirm Myanmar authorization before import.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应把储能电气档案与无线模块批准分开处理；列明所有发射模块并在进口前确认缅甸授权。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應把儲能電氣檔案與無線模組批准分開處理；列明所有發射模組並在進口前確認緬甸授權。
